name: Brown Sugar Walnut Squares
recipeIngredient: 1 cup C and H Brown Sugar (packed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sugar, vanilla, and egg in a bowl. Stir until smooth and blended.
2. In a separate bowl, combine the flour, baking soda, and salt.
3. Add the dry ingredients to the sugar mixture; stir until well combined.
4. Spoon the batter into a greased 8-inch square pan lined with parchment paper.
5. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for 18 to 20 minutes. The cookies will be soft in the center.
6. Allow the cookies to cool in the pan for a few minutes.
7. Remove from the pan and peel off the paper. Cut into 16 squares.
